title: Xtra Crisp American Chicken Skewers
description: A monsoon American dish featuring roasted and crisp chicken skewers with a blend of Shaoxing wine and dairy-free friendly ingredients, perfect for a dinner meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together Shaoxing wine, soy sauce, brown sugar, smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the lemon juice over the chicken skewers.
Roast the chicken skewers in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Increase the oven temperature to broil and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
